serverInfo.name: Wright AI
serverInfo.description: The Documentation Intelligence Platform. Exposes live, verified codebase documentation to AI assistants via MCP — search docs, retrieve function documentation, and list undocumented functions.

transport.description: Local stdio transport — runs inside your project directory

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for doc generation

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Semantic search across all documented functions in the codebase. Returns ranked results with file:line citations.

tools.name: get_function_doc
tools.description: Retrieve complete documentation for a specific function by name or file:line reference.

tools.name: list_undocumented
tools.description: List all undocumented functions in the codebase with their file:line locations.

path.description: Directory or file path to scan
